
> tailwind-styled-v4@5.1.22 build
> npm run build:publish


> tailwind-styled-v4@5.1.22 build:publish
> npm run build:rust && npm run build:packages && rm -rf dist && tsup --config tsup.config.ts && tsup --config tsup.dts.config.ts


> tailwind-styled-v4@5.1.22 build:rust
> cd native && napi build --release --platform && cp tailwind-styled-native.$(node -e "const p=process.platform+'-'+process.arch; console.log(p==='linux-x64'?'linux-x64-gnu':p==='linux-arm64'?'linux-arm64-gnu':p)").node tailwind-styled-native.node


> tailwind-styled-v4@5.1.22 build:packages
> turbo run build --continue
